candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicated total row.
Duplicate total revenue row with same values; acceptable fallback if primary label is missing in some years.
This is COGS, not revenue.
This is COGS, not revenue.

variables.notes: Use revenue labels as a priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Standard direct cost / cost of sales label.
Equivalent COGS label; useful fallback when label changes across years.
Inventory asset, not income statement COGS.
Inventory asset category, not income statement COGS expense.

variables.notes: Use COGS labels from the income statement as a priority list.

candidates.why: Core operating overhead component.
Operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component.
Selling/marketing overhead component.
Explicit selling/marketing overhead bucket.
Selling/marketing overhead component excluding D&A subrow.
Classic SG&A component.
Administrative overhead component excluding D&A subrow.
Separate above-EBIT R&D line; include in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD nets it out.
R&D component, but subordinate to the main R&D line.
Broad overhead/operating expense bucket; acceptable fallback where explicit SG&A components vary by year.
R&D-related supplemental line appears far below EBIT; do not include in XSGA under the above-EBIT rule.
Not present in preview.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total row is shown. Selected overhead component rows and one broader overhead bucket used in different years. Included 'Research and development expenses' because it is a separate above-EBIT operating expense line; PROF uses XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD, so including it here allows netting out when XRD is present. Excluded D&A/amortization subrows, balancing rows, and below-EBIT supplemental R&D line.

candidates.why: Dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line; best choice.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation/Amortization in Research and development expenses
candidates.why: Only the D&A subcomponent of R&D, not the full R&D expense.
Component of R&D expense; fallback if main R&D line is unavailable.
R&D-related label, but appears below EBIT in the preview; acceptable fallback for XRD only.
Capitalized asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Priority list prefers the dedicated above-EBIT R&D line. Included component/fallback labels for years where the reporting label changes. The below-EBIT supplemental 'Research & Development Exp' is included for XRD only, not as an SG&A component.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; fallback if direct interest expense line is unavailable.
Most direct interest expense label and preferred choice.
Direct interest expense label; strong fallback across years.
Only a lease-interest subcomponent, not total interest expense.
Residual finance cost bucket, not preferred if interest expense is reported separately.
Direct interest expense label, though previewed only as a sparse supplemental row.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Not present in preview and would be only a subcomponent anyway.

variables.notes: Priority list prefers explicit interest expense labels; broad 'Finance costs' is retained only as a fallback when explicit interest expense is unavailable.

candidates.why: Income statement item, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity instruments at fair value through OCI
candidates.why: OCI reserve component, not total book equity.
Equity reserve component, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Preferred parent-only equity line; excludes non-controlling interests.
This is minority interest, not BE.
Total equity includes NCI, so less preferred than parent equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line excludes non-controlling interests, avoiding double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet minority interest / NCI equity line.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet NCI equity line rather than the income statement profit-allocation line.
